The '''Kalaanites''' were native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Kalaan/Legends|Kalaan]]. Red-skinned [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoids]] with large red eyes and squarish snouts, they spoke the [[Kalaanite language|Kalaanite]] language.

When their lush planet, which had served as a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] base, was conquered by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]], many Kalaanites joined the [[Kalaanite resistance]] movement.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]'' {{1st}}
